titles.title: I Keep Falling in Love with Him

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I keep falling in love with him Over and over, and over, and over, again. I keep falling in love with him Over and over, and over, and over, again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He gets sweeter and sweeter as the days go by, Oh, what a love between my Lord and I… Just keep falling in love with Him Over and over, and over and over again.
